purpose: strict equal-serialized-byte Q/S/L combination with folded component scaling
interpretation: Descriptive fixed-window comparison: Q+S+L_QL_budget_component_scale has higher mean NLL than Q+L at equal serialized bytes; the normal interval includes zero and the exact sign test is inconclusive. This is non-causal evidence from 16 fixed contiguous windows, not a population-level confidence claim; no multiple-comparison correction was applied.
